question.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trajectory.tracking;
SELECT m.title FROM imdb.movies m ORDER BY m.year ASC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT movieid, COUNT(directorid) FROM imdb.movies2directors GROUP BY movieid HAVING COUNT(directorid) > 7);
SELECT year FROM imdb.movies WHERE movieid = ( SELECT movieid FROM imdb.movies2directors GROUP BY movieid ORDER BY COUNT(directorid) DESC LIMIT 1);

SELECT ac.actorid FROM imdb.actors ac JOIN imdb.movies2actors m2a ON ac.actorid = m2a.actorid WHERE m2a.movieid IN ( SELECT m2a.movieid FROM imdb.actors ac INNER JOIN imdb.movies2actors m2a ON ac.actorid = m2a.actorid WHERE ac.name = 'Hanks, Tom') AND ac.name <> 'Hanks, Tom' GROUP BY ac.actorid ORDER BY COUNT(ac.actorid) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ( SELECT m1.actorid, m2.actorid, COUNT(*) FROM imdb.movies2actors m1 JOIN imdb.movies2actors m2 ON m1.movieid = m2.movieid WHERE m1.actorid < m2.actorid GROUP BY m1.actorid, m2.actorid HAVING COUNT(*) > 10);
SELECT (mv.year / 10) * 10 AS decade FROM imdb.movies mv JOIN imdb.ratings rt ON mv.movieid = rt.movieid GROUP BY (mv.year / 10) * 10 ORDER BY AVG(rt.rank::float) DESC LIMIT 1;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT mv.movieid FROM imdb.movies mv JOIN imdb.movies2directors md ON mv.movieid = md.movieid WHERE genre IS NULL);

SELECT COUNT(dr.movieid) FROM imdb.movies2directors dr JOIN imdb.movies2writers wr ON dr.movieid = wr.movieid JOIN imdb.actors a ON a.actorid = dr.directorid LEFT JOIN imdb.movies2actors ma ON ma.movieid = dr.movieid WHERE dr.directorid = wr.writerid AND ma.actorid IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT movieid) FROM (SELECT * FROM imdb.runningtimes WHERE time1 > 160 ORDER BY movieid);

SELECT ma.actorid FROM imdb.movies2actors ma JOIN imdb.movies m ON m.movieid = ma.movieid WHERE m.year < 2015 GROUP BY ma.actorid HAVING COUNT(ma.movieid) > 43 AND EXISTS (SELECT * FROM imdb.movies2directors md JOIN imdb.directors d ON md.directorid = d.directorid JOIN imdb.movies2actors m2a ON md.movieid = m2a.movieid WHERE d.name = 'Spielberg, Steven' AND m2a.actorid = ma.actorid);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM scenicornot.locations WHERE ST_Within(geom_bng, ST_Buffer(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(326623,523330),27700), 5000));
SELECT h.cell_id FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h JOIN scenicornot.locations l ON ST_INTERSECTS(h.geom, l.geom_bng) GROUP BY h.cell_id HAVING COUNT(h.cell_id) >= 3 ORDER BY AVG(l.average) DESC LIMIT 1;

SELECT h.cell_id FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h WHERE h.cell_id = ( SELECT h.cell_id FROM scenicornot.hexgrid10km h JOIN scenicornot.locations l ON ST_INTERSECTS(h.geom, l.geom_bng) GROUP BY h.cell_id ORDER BY SUM(array_length(string_to_array(l.votes, ','),1)) DESC LIMIT 1);
your SQL ;

SELECT events FROM ( SELECT DATE_BIN('48 hours', datetime, TIMESTAMP '2011-05-01 00:00:00'), COUNT(*) as events FROM quakes.scotquakes GROUP BY DATE_BIN('48 hours', datetime, TIMESTAMP '2011-05-01 00:00:00') ORDER by COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 1);
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT clusterid) FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT ST_ClusterDBSCAN(geom, 15000, 4) OVER () AS clusterid FROM quakes.scotquakes q) WHERE clusterid IS NOT NULL;
SELECT userid FROM trajectory.tracking GROUP BY userid ORDER BY COUNT(userid) DESC LIMIT 1;
your SQL ;
